queue_purpose: DOORSTEP staging — factory work parked at the pre-purchase door awaiting founder revenue activation

staged.title: Sign Epic Fury R2 security gate (0 real vulns; 1 accepted false-positive cert)
staged.why_founder: Release approval is a founder legal act; scan is clean and reconciled 18->0.
staged.action: Sign the sign-off block in docs/evidence/products/epic-fury-2026/security_scan_results_20260707.md, then set posture APPROVED_FOR_PRODUCTION_RELEASE.

staged.title: App Store submission path (Apple Developer / TestFlight / submit)
staged.why_founder: Apple identity + submission are irreducible founder gates (account, 2FA, legal attestation).
staged.action: Archive+upload the signed build via Xcode/Fastlane to App Store Connect under Team K34GR8P326.
staged.evidence: Uploaded build 1.0 - 9 to TestFlight and distributed successfully via Fastlane.

staged.title: Redeploy relay-api with truthful provider_api_calls / founder_gated_execution
staged.why_founder: Deploying to relay-001 is an infra publish act (SSH + docker on the live node).
staged.action: scp infra/hoch-200/vps/relay-api/app.py to relay-001 and: docker compose build relay-api && docker compose up -d relay-api . Then curl /api/live and confirm provider_api_calls=OFF.

staged.title: Expose HOCH NEURO tab in the production dashboard
staged.why_founder: Adding the #react-neuro-root tab + rebuilding/deploying the frontend is a publish act.
staged.action: Apply docs/generated/neuro/wiring_snippet.md to dashboard index.html, run frontend build (tsc && vite build), deploy. Panel is inert until #react-neuro-root exists.

staged.title: Generate photoreal brain image (paid burst GPU)
staged.why_founder: Image generation needs paid burst compute or a keyed image service — a spend action.
staged.action: Run the spec in docs/generated/neuro/brain_image_spec.md on burst GPU (or approved image tool); place hoch-brain.png at frontend/public/assets/ and assets/. Panel auto-composites it.

staged.title: Commit neuro panel + tests through the change board
staged.why_founder: git commit/tag on the real repo runs on your Mac; push is a founder gate.
staged.action: Run scripts/baseline_guard.py, commit hoch-neuro-*.{html,js}, frontend/src/{lib,components}/neuro/*, tests/test_hoch_neuro_derive.js, infra/.../app.py, then tag a new baseline.

staged.title: Install Apple design tools on the Mac (Icon Composer, SF Symbols 8, fonts, bezels)
staged.why_founder: Downloading + installing .dmg tools on your Mac is an on-device install act.
staged.action: Download from developer.apple.com/design/resources: Icon Composer (macOS Sequoia+), SF Symbols 8 beta, SF Pro/SF Mono/New York fonts, iPhone 17 + iPad Pro (M5) bezels. Install.

staged.title: Produce Epic Fury Liquid Glass layered app icon
staged.why_founder: Icon art + Xcode packaging is an on-device creative act on your Mac.
staged.action: In Icon Composer build the 3-4 layer Epic Fury icon per docs/generated/apple/epic_fury_liquid_glass_refresh.md (light/dark/clear), export Epic-Fury.icon + flattened 1024 PNG. Ship in the next build (not this review).

staged.title: Produce Epic Fury screenshots in current bezels
staged.why_founder: Capturing/rendering marketing screenshots is an on-device act; App Store upload is a founder gate.
staged.action: Render the 6-frame set (per storyboard) in iPhone 17 / iPad Pro M5 bezels, captions sentence-case, then upload via App Store Connect at next submission.

staged.title: Epic Fury monetization = Path B (monetize now, resubmit)
staged.why_founder: App is free; the subscription IAP is the ONLY revenue path and is a founder App Store Connect act.
staged.action: Decision made. Execute docs/revenue/epic_fury_pathB_resubmit_plan.md (steps below).

staged.title: Sign Paid Apps agreement + confirm banking/tax
staged.why_founder: Legal agreement + banking/tax are irreducible founder acts to receive money.
staged.action: Accept the Paid Apps agreement in App Store Connect; confirm bank account + tax forms so sales can pay out.

staged.title: Provision Story Studio Stripe live keys + payout bank
staged.why_founder: Live payment keys + payout bank are founder credential/money acts.
staged.action: Create Stripe live products/prices per docs/revenue/story_studio_stripe_spec.md, connect payout bank, provide live keys to the deploy (never in chat).

staged.title: Ensure Epic Fury in-app upgrades use Apple IAP, not Stripe (3.1.1)
staged.why_founder: Payment routing for a shipping iOS app is a release-compliance + build decision.
staged.action: Confirmed in code: web->Stripe, native iOS->RevenueCat/StoreKit (lib/purchases.ts + PaywallModal). No 3.1.1 fix needed; keep the split.

staged.title: Wire caveman brevity into agent system prompt (change board)
staged.why_founder: Edits backend/agent_executor.py (DENY_WRITE) — must pass baseline_guard + your commit.
staged.action: Prepend config/caveman_brevity.json rules as a BREVITY block to the agent system prompt behind env AGENT_BREVITY=1 (reversible); run tests + baseline_guard; commit.

staged.title: Close ARC LAN exposure (rebind ~8 services to localhost / pf firewall)
staged.why_founder: Rebinding services + pf rules are system-config changes needing sudo/app edits.
staged.action: Apply Option A (rebind to 127.0.0.1) or Option B (pf block) from docs/security/arc_hardening.md for ports 8080/8810/8820/8830/8789/8898/3003/54932.

staged.title: Kill orphan/duplicate local daemons (incl. double-bound 8080)
staged.why_founder: Killing processes is potentially destructive — founder-only, hard-gated.
staged.action: Per docs/security/arc_cleanup.md: inspect each cmd, kill stale daemons (graceful first), stop unused LLM runtimes. Do NOT kill rapportd/ControlCenter/postgres/8011 adapter.

staged.title: Install available macOS updates (26.5.2 has updates)
staged.why_founder: OS install is a system change on your Mac.
staged.action: Review softwareupdate -l, then install via System Settings > Software Update (or softwareupdate -i). Reboot as needed.

staged.title: ASC: create the 2 auto-renewable subs (exact IDs) + review screenshot
staged.why_founder: Creating subs + prices is a founder money act.
staged.action: App Store Connect > Subscriptions: create group + com.epicfury.dashboard.pro_monthly ($4.99/mo) + com.epicfury.dashboard.pro_annual ($39.99/yr), localized name/desc + subscription review screenshot; generate App-Specific Shared Secret.

staged.title: RevenueCat: products + entitlement pro + offering + keys + webhook
staged.why_founder: RevenueCat account config + keys are founder credential acts.
staged.action: RevenueCat: add iOS app (Shared Secret), 2 products (same IDs), entitlement pro, offering current (monthly+annual), copy iOS public SDK key, set webhook to /api/webhooks/revenuecat with secret.

staged.title: Provide RevenueCat keys to build env
staged.why_founder: Live keys are secrets you provision, not chat.
staged.action: Set NEXT_PUBLIC_REVENUECAT_IOS_KEY + REVENUECAT_WEBHOOK_SECRET in Vercel + local build env. Then the swarm rebuild (ns-ef-rebuild) can run.

staged.title: Upload new build, attach subs to v1.0, resubmit
staged.why_founder: Upload + submit carry your legal attestations.
staged.action: Upload the rebuilt binary; in ASC pull v1.0 from review, attach both subs to the version + review submission, resubmit.

staged.title: Story Studio: create live Stripe products + provision live keys + payout bank
staged.why_founder: Live payment keys + payout bank are founder money/credential acts.
staged.action: Live catalog + payouts are ON. Remaining to take money: provision Vercel KV, register the LIVE webhook (/api/webhook) -> STRIPE_WEBHOOK_SECRET, set env (price IDs, STRIPE_SECRET_KEY live, AUTH_SECRET, BASE_URL), deploy, then ONE real $19 purchase -> confirm unlock -> refund. See docs/revenue/story_studio_go_live.md.

staged.title: Pick notify channel + set config/notify.json (ntfy topic or Pushover token)
staged.why_founder: The push topic/token is a secret you set, not chat.
staged.action: Copy config/notify.example.json to config/notify.json; for ntfy set a long random topic + subscribe in the ntfy app; or set Pushover user_key+app_token. Then run ns-notify-selftest.

staged.title: Wire code_task_gate into agent_executor (change board)
staged.why_founder: Edits backend/agent_executor.py (DENY_WRITE) - baseline_guard + your commit.
staged.action: In the code-task branch call scripts/code_task_gate.gate(file,acceptance); accept on verified, else retry with retry_hint (cap N). Behind AGENT_ALLOW_CODE=1. Run tests + baseline_guard + commit. See docs/factories/CODE_LOOP_RELIABILITY.md.

staged.title: Deploy /space to relay (bookmarkable HOCH SPACE link)
staged.why_founder: Relay redeploy is an infra publish act.
staged.action: scp infra/hoch-200/vps/dashboard/space.html + hoch-neuro-derive.js + relay-api/app.py to relay-001; docker compose build/up relay-api. Then http://100.87.18.15:3012/space is live (Tailscale-internal).

staged.title: Set Story Studio auth env (AUTH_SECRET + optional mailer)
staged.why_founder: Secrets you provision, not chat.
staged.action: In Vercel set AUTH_SECRET (long random) to enable magic-link login; optional RESEND_API_KEY + MAIL_FROM to email links (else dev link returned). Enables creators subscription unlock.

staged.title: Sign in to Stripe (Google) + run the HAS factory catalog bootstrap
staged.why_founder: Account sign-in + API keys + money activation are founder acts (Claude cannot create accounts or log in).
staged.action: Follow docs/revenue/stripe_setup_steps.md: sign in at dashboard.stripe.com with michael.b.hoch@gmail.com, grab sk_test_, run `cd hsf/deploy && npm install && STRIPE_SECRET_KEY=sk_test_... node bootstrap-stripe.js`, paste the STRIPE_PRICE_* + AUTH_SECRET into Vercel, register the webhook, deploy, test-purchase with 4242.
staged.result: Stripe LIVE account active (acct_1Tdge9DINF9KNAIC, charges+payouts enabled). Catalog created: onestory price_1TqjVNDINF9KNAICvsZ4Kl3t ($19), creators price_1TqjVNDINF9KNAICsqE8sy0G ($12/mo).
